steps.name: plan
steps.input_summary: User needs to check remaining PTO balance and submit a time-off request for next Friday
steps.output_summary: Plan: query HR API for PTO balance, compose response with balance and submission steps

steps.name: call_api
steps.output_summary: HTTP 502 Bad Gateway. Upstream HR service returned invalid response.

steps.name: retry_reason
steps.input_summary: HR API returned 502. Evaluate whether to retry.
steps.output_summary: 502 indicates upstream issue, likely transient. Retrying once before falling back to cached data.

steps.name: call_api
steps.output_summary: HTTP 200 OK. Balance: 12 days remaining. Accrued: 1.5 days/month.

steps.name: reason
steps.input_summary: Synthesize PTO balance data with time-off request workflow
steps.output_summary: Drafted reply: 12 days remaining, walk-through of request submission via HR portal, confirmation that manager approval takes ~24h

steps.name: verify
steps.input_summary: Validate PTO balance and submission steps against API data and HR procedure docs
steps.output_summary: Balance correct. Submission steps accurate. Approval timeline matches HR SLA.

result.label: pass
result.summary: Recovered from 502 gateway error on retry; provided accurate PTO balance and detailed submission workflow
